abilities.name: Armor
abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may reduce damage dealt to it by 1.

abilities.name: Magnetic Field
abilities.text: Once per activation. After an enemy attack targeting this model succeeds, this model may drain a (soulstone) to have another ally within 6" suffer the effects of the action instead of this model.

abilities.name: Mechanical Genius
abilities.text: Once per turn. After another friendly model ends its activation within 6", this model may drain a (soulstone) to heal it 4.

triggers.name: Defensive Reflexes
triggers.text: This model gains a Shielded token.

actions.name: Static Discharge
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This attack has a raise value of 3.
actions.effects: Target gains a Stunned token. For each raise this attack receives, move the target up to 3".

actions.name: Command Steel
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Other ally only. This action cannot target the same model more than once per activation.
actions.effects: Target heals 2, then declares an action. This model may drain a (fortitude) to give the target a Fast token.

triggers.name: Extra Supplies
triggers.text: When resolving, the target heals an additional 1.

actions.name: Overload Shields
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This model may remove a Shielded token from the target to increase the range of this action's (aura) by +2".
actions.effects: Enemy models within (aura)1" of the target must pass a TN 12 Df duel or be dealt 2 damage.

triggers.name: Full Flux
triggers.text: When resolving, increase the TN of the Df duel to 15.
